title: Know Yourself
description: Know Yourself is a contemporary dance work about self-reflection, bodily awareness, and inner reconstruction. Directed by dance artist Zhiyuan HUANGcentred on the question of what it means to truly know oneself, the piece explores the individual’s journey through pressure, memory, uncertainty, and the quiet voices of the inner self. In this work, the body becomes both the medium of expression and the object of observation. Movement begins with subtle gestures, breath, touch, and shifts of weight, gradually developing into more intense physical tension, resistance, and spatial exploration. These changing movement qualities reflect the struggles, confusion, confrontation, and awakening that often accompany the process of self-discovery. Rather than offering a fixed answer, Know Yourself invites the audience into an open inner journey. As external expectations, social identities, and imposed labels begin to fall away, the work asks: can we truly listen to the voice within the body?
